0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Installation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne supports multiple installation methods depending on your use case."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Standalone pip Install"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The simplest way to get started:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"pip install mnemosyne","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"This installs the core package with all required dependencies."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Hermes Plugin Install"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"If you're using Mnemosyne as a Hermes agent plugin:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"hermes plugin install mnemosyne","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Or add to your ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes.yaml"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"plugins:\n- name: mnemosyne\n  config:\n    db_path: ./memory.db\n    embedding_model: text-embedding-3-small\n","language":"yaml"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Development Install"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"For contributing or running from source:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"git clone https://github.com/axdsan/mnemosyne.git\ncd mnemosyne\npip install -e &quot;.[dev]&quot;\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Dependency Tiers"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Tier | Command | Description |\n|------|---------|-------------|\n| Minimal | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne"}]," | Core only, CPU embeddings |\n| Standard | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne[openai]"}]," | + OpenAI embeddings |\n| Full | ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne[all]"}]," | All optional dependencies |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Verify Your Install"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"python -c &quot;from mnemosyne import Memory;
